title: Make website fully responsive for mobile and desktop

requirements.summary: Update Navigation component to ensure mobile menu is fully functional with proper touch interactions and responsive breakpoints
acceptanceCriteria: Mobile navigation menu opens and closes smoothly on touch devices
Navigation links work correctly on mobile screens
Menu adapts properly at tablet and desktop breakpoints

file_operations.description: Add responsive mobile menu with hamburger toggle, ensure smooth transitions and touch-friendly interactions. Implement proper breakpoint handling for tablet and desktop views. Increase touch target sizes for mobile buttons and links to meet minimum 44x44px standard.

requirements.summary: Optimize HeroSection for mobile devices with responsive text sizing, button layout, and 3D sphere performance
acceptanceCriteria: Hero text scales appropriately on small screens (320px+)
CTA buttons stack vertically on mobile with proper spacing
3D AI sphere renders efficiently on mobile devices without performance issues

file_operations.description: Implement responsive typography using Tailwind's text-* utilities with mobile-first approach. Stack CTA buttons vertically on mobile with proper spacing, arrange horizontally on tablet+. Add responsive sizing for the 3D sphere container to prevent overflow on small screens.

Optimize 3D sphere rendering for mobile by reducing particle count and animation complexity on smaller screens. Implement viewport-based performance scaling to maintain smooth 30+ FPS on mobile devices. Consider using reduced quality settings or simplified geometry for mobile.

requirements.summary: Ensure ServicesSection grid adapts responsively from single column on mobile to multi-column layout on tablet and desktop
acceptanceCriteria: Service cards display in single column on mobile (< 640px)
Cards arrange in 2 columns on tablets (640px - 1024px)
Cards display in 3 columns on desktop (> 1024px)

file_operations.description: Update grid layout to use responsive Tailwind classes: grid-cols-1 for mobile, sm:grid-cols-2 for tablet, lg:grid-cols-3 for desktop. Ensure proper gap spacing scales appropriately across breakpoints.
Ensure card content scales properly on mobile with responsive padding and text sizing. Verify icon sizes and spacing work well on small screens while maintaining visual hierarchy.

requirements.summary: Make PricingSection pricing cards responsive with proper stacking on mobile and grid layout on desktop
acceptanceCriteria: Pricing cards stack vertically on mobile screens
Cards arrange in 2x2 grid on tablets
Cards display in horizontal row on large desktop screens
Text and pricing remain readable at all screen sizes

file_operations.description: Implement responsive grid layout: grid-cols-1 for mobile, md:grid-cols-2 for tablet (2x2), xl:grid-cols-4 for large desktop (horizontal row). Adjust gap spacing for each breakpoint to maintain visual balance.

Optimize card internal layout for mobile with responsive padding, font sizes, and feature list spacing. Ensure pricing text remains prominent and readable on small screens. Make "Get Started" button full-width on mobile for better touch accessibility.

requirements.summary: Optimize ProductShowcase mockup cards for mobile viewing with appropriate image sizing and touch interactions
acceptanceCriteria: Mockup images scale properly on mobile without overflow
Cards are touch-friendly with appropriate spacing
Lazy loading works efficiently on mobile connections

file_operations.description: Update grid layout to be fully responsive: grid-cols-1 on mobile, sm:grid-cols-2 on tablet, lg:grid-cols-3 on desktop. Adjust gap spacing and ensure proper image container constraints to prevent overflow on small screens.

Ensure images use responsive sizing with proper aspect ratio constraints. Add touch-friendly hover states and increase interactive areas for mobile. Verify lazy loading works efficiently with appropriate loading thresholds for mobile connections.

requirements.summary: Ensure ProjectCalculator form is mobile-friendly with responsive inputs, checkboxes, and button sizing
acceptanceCriteria: Form inputs are large enough for easy mobile interaction
Checkboxes have sufficient touch target size (minimum 44x44px)
Calculate button is easily tappable on mobile devices
Results display clearly on small screens

file_operations.description: Increase touch target sizes for all checkboxes to minimum 44x44px with proper spacing. Make form inputs and buttons larger on mobile with responsive padding. Ensure results section has readable typography on small screens. Stack form elements vertically with appropriate gaps on mobile, optimize layout for tablet and desktop.

requirements.summary: Make ContactSection form and contact info cards responsive with proper mobile layout
acceptanceCriteria: Contact form inputs are mobile-friendly with proper sizing
Contact info cards stack vertically on mobile
Phone number link (tel:7678643475) is tappable on mobile devices
Form submission works smoothly on touch devices

file_operations.description: Implement responsive layout with form and info cards stacking on mobile. Increase input field heights and padding for better mobile usability. Ensure phone link (tel:7678643475) has sufficient touch target size. Make submit button full-width on mobile with proper height. Adjust grid layout for contact info cards: grid-cols-1 on mobile, md:grid-cols-3 on desktop.

requirements.summary: Optimize TechnologyStack grid and animated connections for mobile devices with reduced animation complexity if needed for performance
acceptanceCriteria: Technology cards display in responsive grid (1 column mobile, 2 columns tablet, 3 columns desktop)
Animated connections render without performance issues on mobile
Text and icons remain readable at all screen sizes

file_operations.description: Update grid layout to be fully responsive: grid-cols-1 on mobile, sm:grid-cols-2 on tablet, lg:grid-cols-3 on desktop. Ensure card content and icons scale appropriately. Adjust spacing and padding for optimal mobile viewing.

Implement performance optimization for mobile devices by detecting viewport size and reducing animation complexity (fewer connection lines, reduced update frequency) on screens under 768px. Ensure canvas resizes properly on orientation changes. Consider using requestAnimationFrame throttling on mobile to improve battery efficiency.

requirements.summary: Ensure WhatsAppButton remains accessible and properly positioned on mobile devices with appropriate sizing for thumb interaction
acceptanceCriteria: WhatsApp button is easily tappable (minimum 48x48px touch target)
Button positioning doesn't overlap important content on mobile
Button animation doesn't cause performance issues on mobile devices

file_operations.description: Ensure button meets minimum 48x48px touch target size for mobile. Adjust bottom and right positioning on mobile to prevent overlap with content while remaining accessible. Optimize pulse animation to reduce CPU usage on mobile devices. Consider reducing animation complexity or frequency on mobile for better battery efficiency.

requirements.summary: Verify AboutFounder section displays responsively with proper image and text layout on mobile and desktop
acceptanceCriteria: Founder profile photo scales appropriately on mobile
Bio text is readable with proper line length on all screen sizes
Quote section maintains visual hierarchy on mobile

file_operations.description: Implement responsive layout with image and text stacking vertically on mobile, side-by-side on desktop. Scale profile photo appropriately using the generated asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/founder-nitesh.dim_400x400.png. Ensure text has optimal line length on all screens with responsive font sizing. Adjust padding and spacing for mobile-first approach.

requirements.summary: Test and optimize all canvas-based animations for mobile performance and battery efficiency
acceptanceCriteria: Canvas animations run smoothly on mobile devices (minimum 30 FPS)
Animations pause or reduce complexity when battery is low
No excessive CPU usage causing device heating on mobile

file_operations.description: Implement mobile-specific optimizations: reduce particle count on screens under 768px, implement frame rate throttling for mobile devices, add battery-aware performance scaling if Battery API is available. Ensure canvas resizes efficiently on orientation changes without causing jank.

Optimize animation loop for mobile by reducing line complexity and update frequency on smaller viewports. Implement efficient canvas clearing and redrawing strategies. Add performance monitoring to detect and respond to low frame rates by further reducing animation complexity.

Add viewport-based performance management that detects mobile devices and passes performance hints to child components. Implement global animation quality settings that can be adjusted based on device capabilities. Ensure all canvas-based components receive appropriate performance constraints.
